title: agrostis lemmonii
intro: Agrostis lemmonii, also known as Lemmon's bent grass or Lemmon's bentgrass, is a species of grass in the family Poaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic effects. The health benefits associated with Agrostis lemmonii include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of gastrointestinal issues and respiratory problems. Agrostis lemmonii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures for use in traditional medicine.
